search.query: index=proxylogon sourcetype=iis (cs_uri_stem="*autodiscover*" OR cs_uri_stem="*/ecp/*") (cs_uri_query="*@*" OR cs_Cookie="*X-AnonResource-Backend*" OR cs_Cookie="*X-BEResource*") | lookup hafnium_ips src_ip AS c_ip OUTPUT isBad AS ip_conocida_hafnium | search ip_conocida_hafnium=TRUE | dedup _time c_ip cs_uri_stem | table _time c_ip ip_conocida_hafnium cs_uri_stem cs_uri_query sc_status time_taken | sort _time

index=proxylogon sourcetype=iis c_ip="103.77.192.219" ((cs_uri_stem="/ecp/proxyLogon.ecp" cs_method=POST) OR (cs_uri_stem="/owa/auth/help.aspx" cs_method=GET)) | dedup cs_uri_stem | table _time c_ip cs_method cs_uri_stem sc_status time_taken | sort _time

panel.title: Fase 4 - Comando y Control: Ejecucion via Webshell

search.query: index=proxylogon sourcetype=windows_events_proxylogon EventCode=4688 ParentProcessName="*w3wp.exe*" | dedup CommandLine | table _time Computer NewProcessName ParentProcessName CommandLine | sort _time

panel.title: Fase 5a - Acciones sobre objetivos: Exportacion de buzon

search.query: index=proxylogon sourcetype=windows_events_proxylogon EventCode=4104 ScriptBlockText="*New-MailboxExportRequest*" | dedup ScriptBlockText | table _time Computer ScriptBlockText

panel.title: Fase 5b - Acciones sobre objetivos: Acceso a LSASS

search.query: index=proxylogon sourcetype=windows_events_proxylogon EventCode=10 TargetProcessName="*lsass.exe*" NOT SourceProcessName IN ("*MsMpEng.exe*", "*procexp*", "*Taskmgr.exe*") | dedup SourceProcessName TargetProcessName | table _time Computer SourceProcessName TargetProcessName GrantedAccess

panel.title: Linea de tiempo completa del ataque (los 2 sourcetypes correlacionados)

search.query: index=proxylogon (sourcetype=iis c_ip="103.77.192.219") OR (sourcetype=windows_events_proxylogon (ParentProcessName="*w3wp.exe*" OR EventCode=4104 OR EventCode=10)) | eval evento=case( match(cs_uri_query,"@"), "SSRF Autodiscover", cs_uri_stem="/ecp/proxyLogon.ecp", "Escritura webshell (POST)", cs_uri_stem="/owa/auth/help.aspx", "Acceso al webshell", EventCode=4688, "Ejecucion de comando via w3wp.exe", EventCode=4104, "Exportacion de buzon", EventCode=10, "Acceso a LSASS", 1=1, "Otro") | dedup _time evento | table _time evento sourcetype c_ip CommandLine ScriptBlockText | sort _time

panel.title: Validacion cruzada: mismo patron en ejecucion REAL del exploit (dataset publico OTRF)

search.query: index=proxylogon sourcetype=json_otrf_real EventID=1 ParentImage="*w3wp*" | table TimeCreated Hostname Image ParentImage CommandLine | sort TimeCreated
